calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shawn Bankson for Lasalle Apartments, who is present.
Adam Trigg, Limited Scope Attorney, for Moishey Lane, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Settlement terms are as stated in the signed agreement for premises located at 20 Osceola Lane, #3, San Francisco, CA. See scanned document. Trial date of 1/12/09 is vacated.

JPT Barbara Anscher, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (218)
